title: QueryFailureStatus
description: Status returned when a query execution fails.

code.description: Error code for the query failure.

sqlState.description: SQL state code indicating the error category.

statementHandle.description: Handle that uniquely identifies the failed statement.

createdOn.description: Timestamp that specifies when the statement execution started. The timestamp is expressed in milliseconds since the epoch.

statementStatusUrl.description: URL for checking the status of the failed statement.
